title: VLA-Corrector: Lightweight Detect-and-Correct Inference for Adaptive Action Horizon
innovation_summary: VLA-Corrector: Lightweight Detect-and-Correct Inference for Adaptive Action Horizon: To address this limitation, we propose VLA-Corrector, a lightweight corrective inference framework for action-chunked VLA policies.
